ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work class of the individual */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight of the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relationship of the individual */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race of the individual */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the native country of the individual */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income of the individual */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method */,
  "data_frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data frequency */,
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("data_collection_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("data_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES incomes ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_data_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_frequency_id") REFERENCES data_frequencies ("data_frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the work class */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the work class (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the marital status */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the marital status (e.g., married, single) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the occupation */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the occupation (e.g., professional, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the relationship (e.g., family, non-family) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the race */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the race (e.g., ethnic, racial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sex */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the sex (e.g., male, female) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the native country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income */,
  "income_name" TEXT /* Name of the income */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the income (e.g., low, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "data_collection_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "data_collection_method_description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date from which the collection method is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date until which the collection method is valid */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_collection_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_frequencies" (
  "data_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data frequency */,
  "data_frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the data frequency */,
  "data_frequency_description" TEXT /* Description of the data frequency */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date from which the frequency is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date until which the frequency is valid */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the data version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
